Pipeline Operational Status for 03/12/2026


Notice Text:

Linepack Status - Critical

System Linepack - 3,474 MMCF

Target Linepack - 3,200 MMCF

Forecasted Linepack - 3,820 MMCF

Physical Operations Notes : Linepack is at an unhealthy level, increasing overnight and is expected to increase further today.

Commercial Operations Notes: Shippers must ensure accounts are within tolerance.

The Pipeline Operational & Commercial Status can be found in LINK under: Customer Activities > Flowing Gas > Imbalance > Pipeline Operational & Commercial Status.
